observation.command: for d in functional-0/004_const_var_defn.sysu.c functional-1/017_mul.sysu.c functional-2/030_func_defn.sysu.c functional-3/032_if.sysu.c functional-3/049_unary_op.sysu.c; do echo ===$d answer===; python3 -m json.tool /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/$d/answer.json | sed -n '1,220p'; echo ===$d output===; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/$d/output.json | head -c 1000; echo; echo score; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/$d/score.txt; done
